zh.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Maxwell於1310年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，他的父親John Maxwell25歲，母親Christian Carlile24歲。他於1334年與Christian Erskine在英國英格蘭波藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1373年4月15日在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年63歲。

zh-hans.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Maxwell于1310年出生在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可时，他的父亲John Maxwell25岁，母亲Christian Carlile24岁。他于1334年与Christian Erskine在英国英格兰波藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1373年4月15日在英国苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Maxwell was born in 1310, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, John Maxwell, was 25 and his mother, Christian Carlile, was 24. He married Christian Erskine in 1334, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 April 1373, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Maxwell est né en 1310, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John Maxwell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Christian Carlile, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Christian Erskine en 1334, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 avril 1373, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Maxwell 1310 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Maxwell 25 und seine Mutter Christian Carlile 24. Er hat 1334 in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Christian Erskine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. April 1373 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell è nato il nel 1310 nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Maxwell, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Christian Carlile, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Christian Erskine nel 1334, nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 aprile 1373, nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Maxwellが1310年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで生まれた時，父John Maxwellは25歳，母Christian Carlileは24歳であった。1334年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドでChristian Erskineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1373年4月15日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Maxwell(이)가 1310년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Maxwell(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Carlile(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드에서 Christian Erskine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년 4월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: Caerlaverock, Dumfreize, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell nasceu em 1310, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Maxwell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Christian Carlile, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian Erskine em 1334, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de abril de 1373, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Maxwell родился в 1310 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Maxwell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Carlile, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Erskine в 1334 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 апреля 1373 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Maxwell nació en 1310, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, John Maxwell, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Christian Carlile, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Christian Erskine en 1334, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de abril de 1373, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
